action.reasoning: Observation: The training command in iteration 26 failed immediately because train.py accepts --epochs, not --max_epochs. We now have only ~84 seconds (0.0234 h) and 4 iterations left. Training even a single model takes ~40–50 s, leaving almost no margin for evaluation, so a new training run risks being killed by the time budget. Analysis: Our strongest artifact is the ensemble_15 directory, which produced the best test AUC so far of 0.7658. All 15 models (m0..m14.pt) inside it are compatible with the current predict.py and model.py. There is no faster way to improve than to re-submit this proven ensemble. Decision: Skip any training or file changes and immediately submit ensemble_15 for evaluation to lock in the best score without risking a timeout.
